CREATE TABLE test_running_accumulate (id UInt32, value UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, runningAccumulate(sumState(value)) AS accumulated_sum FROM (SELECT id, sumState(value) FROM test_running_accumulate GROUP BY id ORDER BY id, value);
SELECT id, value, runningAccumulate(state) AS accumulated_value FROM (SELECT id, value, sumState(value) AS state FROM test_running_accumulate GROUP BY id, value ORDER BY id, value);

SELECT grouping, item, runningAccumulate(state, grouping) AS accumulated FROM (SELECT toInt8(id) AS grouping, value AS item, sumState(value) AS state FROM test_running_accumulate GROUP BY grouping, item ORDER BY grouping, item);
CREATE TABLE test_running_accumulate_2 (groupId UInt32, num UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupId, runningAccumulate(sumState(num)) AS total_accumulated FROM (SELECT groupId, num, sumState(num) FROM test_running_accumulate_2 GROUP BY groupId ORDER BY groupId, num);

SELECT t1.groupId, t1.num, runningAccumulate(sumState(t2.num)) AS running_total FROM test_running_accumulate_2 AS t1 JOIN test_running_accumulate AS t2 ON t1.groupId = t2.id GROUP BY t1.groupId, t1.num ORDER BY t1.groupId, t1.num;
SELECT t1.id, runningAccumulate(sumState(t1.value)) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_running_accumulate ORDER BY id, value) AS t1 GROUP BY t1.id;
CREATE TABLE test_running_accumulate_3 (col1 UInt32, col2 UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col1;
SELECT col1, runningAccumulate(sumState(col2)) AS cumulative_result FROM (SELECT col1, sumState(col2) FROM test_running_accumulate_3 GROUP BY col1 ORDER BY col1) GROUP BY col1;
